title: OmniFormatter Bash / PowerShell / Zsh / AWK / Sed Configuration Schema
description: Merged formatting configuration for shell scripting and text processing languages.

bash__shebangRequired.description: [Bash] Require #!/usr/bin/env bash shebang on first line.

bash__variableQuoting.description: [Bash] Always double-quote variable expansions: "$var" prevents word-splitting.

bash__commandSubstitution.description: [Bash] Prefer $(cmd) over `cmd`. Backtick style is deprecated.

bash__testOperator.description: [Bash] [[ ]] is bash-specific and safer. [ ] is POSIX-portable.

bash__localVariables.description: [Bash] Use 'local' keyword inside functions to prevent global pollution.

powershell__endOfLine.description: [PowerShell] PowerShell is Windows-native; CRLF is default.

powershell__cmdletCase.description: [PowerShell] Normalize cmdlets to Verb-Noun PascalCase (Get-Item vs get-item).

powershell__aliasExpansion.description: [PowerShell] Expand aliases to full cmdlet names (ls -> Get-ChildItem).

awk__fieldSeparator.description: [AWK] Default field separator. 'auto' uses the AWK default (whitespace). Can be set to e.g. ','

sed__scriptStyle.description: [Sed] GNU extensions vs strict POSIX compatibility.
